group_1.textLeft: I'd like to ask a few questions, too.
Yes... It'll be an unprecedented backwards@interview!
Oh yes, yes indeed! Bless, how I've waited for this moment!

group_1.textRight: That much interest...?!@Just what do you want to know about me...?

group_1.textLeft: What, exactly, is the "Uwasa of the Wind@Evangelist"?
As a Coordinator, it's definitely something that@concerns me.
Tell me as much as you can, please~!

group_1.textCenter: <In the end, Kagome gave into pressure@and spoke, but...>
<The Uwasa of the Wind Evangelist@was born around THAT time...>

group_1.narration: Etched into my book are the dreams the@four of us wove back in the hospital.
My menagerie of Uwasa, written in my own@lifeforce... Come forth now, one last time.@Let us prevent this most tragic of endings.
And this time, let us leave a@kind tale behind, one that will not@result in more trouble for others.

group_1.textCenter: I'll strike you now with every Uwasa I have@recorded in this tome!
Even if it means etching away the last of@my life to manifest them repeatedly!

group_1.narration: ―Alina―@Ah ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha haaa!

group_1.textCenter: <The Uwasa of the Wind Evangelist was born@right around then, and eventually...>
<It found a girl with a strong desire to@spread the truth about Magical Girls.>
<And as she got caught up in the ongoing@commotion in Kamihama City...>
<The Uwasa of the Wind Evangelist@took on a physical form of its own...>
<This was thanks to the@influence of Kagome's heart―>
<That is, "a heart at the moment of resolution"...>
<Even when faced with really difficult situations,@she's able to summon a firm resolve...>
<That also ended up giving magic to@the Uwasa of the Wind Evangelist.>
<It might be obvious from the outside, but...>
<Kagome was steadily moving forward,@taking one step at a time...>
<These steps were bringing about changes in@Kagome.>
<And I'm sure that will@continue into the future...>
